posts.text: BREAKING: The US Military has conducted new strikes in the area of the Strait of Hormuz, per Axios. This would mark the first US strikes in the region since the “Memorandum of Understanding” was signed.

posts.text: Yesterday, @CGN_Group's #Taipingling #NPP unit 2 reached first criticality. The unit is equipped with a Hualong One reactor.
